posts.author: Dave (Dave Grant)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mail Chimp
I’m trying something I thought was simple
When there is a new item on a board, copy the details to an audience in Mail Chimp.
There appears to be an integration that does this, however I can’t get it to work. I can connect to the Mail Chimp account OK, but the automation doesn’t appear to start and send the data to Mail Chimp.
Any thoughts?
Thanks
Dave In NZ

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi this may not be the answer you are looking for but Spot-nik has just launched a new emailing app- SuperMail- it can be used for email marketing and it may help you to replace instead of MailChimp-
Take a look at the video here - Introduction to superMail - YouTube
This is a link to download the app- monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

If you have any questions- please contact me
